embed.go.note: Must be in root package (package assets) to reach web/dist/

internal/types.purpose: Core type definitions shared across all packages

internal/telnet.purpose: Native Go telnet client for Valmet DNA nodes

internal/parser.purpose: Parsers for FBC, RPC, and SysFile output

internal/bstool.purpose: Go wrapper for proprietary Windows BsTool.exe utility
internal/bstool.note: Platform-adaptive: Windows runs real BsTool.exe, Linux returns 501 UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM. 96.3% test coverage.

internal/api.purpose: HTTP handlers, middleware, and server startup

internal/server.purpose: Server config, health checks, graceful shutdown

mock_services: Mock DNA TCP server (FBC/RPC protocol with prompt detection)

gotchas.rule: Never return nil slices in JSON responses
gotchas.detail: Always initialize slices as empty (make([]T, 0)) before JSON marshaling. nil slices serialize as null; empty slices serialize as [].
The //go:embed directive can only reach files in or below its own package directory. To embed web/dist/*, the directive must live in a .go file at the repo root (embed.go, package assets).

gotchas.rule: Go 1.22+ routing patterns require METHOD prefix
gotchas.detail: Route patterns like 'GET /api/v1/nodes/{addr}' include the HTTP method. Without the method prefix, the pattern matches all methods.

gotchas.rule: CGo SQLite requires gcc for cross-compilation
gotchas.detail: github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 uses CGo. Cross-compiling (e.g., GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64) requires a C cross-compiler. For pure-Go builds, consider a CGo-free SQLite driver.

gotchas.rule: Test flags must be filtered from os.Args
gotchas.detail: When running tests, go test injects flags like -test.v, -test.run, etc. into os.Args. The config parser must filter these out to avoid flag parsing errors.

gotchas.rule: SPA fallback: serve index.html for unknown paths
gotchas.detail: The embedded web UI is a Single Page Application. Any path that doesn't match a static file or API route must serve index.html for client-side routing to work.
Valmet DNA nodes use '>' as the command prompt. The telnet client reads until this prompt character appears. Different DNA versions may use different prompts.

gotchas.rule: SysFile entries don't have IP addresses
gotchas.detail: Parsed .sys file entries have LID (logical ID) but no IP address. When storing as nodes, the LID is used as a placeholder address. Real IPs must be resolved separately.

gotchas.rule: npm run build must precede go build for embedded web UI
gotchas.detail: The //go:embed directive in embed.go embeds web/dist/* at compile time. If web/dist/ is empty (only .gitkeep), the binary starts but GUI routes return 404. Always run 'make build' (which does npm run build then go build). The startup guard warns if embed is empty.

gotchas.rule: R-LIVE phase is mandatory in dev-cycle loop
gotchas.detail: After every build, the reviewer MUST start the binary and test both API and GUI surfaces with real HTTP requests. Auto-re-loop on FAIL with exact failure evidence. This caught the StatusBar bug (wrong URL + field names) and the template-default-not-found bug.

gotchas.rule: Template 'default' is a soft default — not an error if missing
gotchas.detail: When no template is specified in report generation, the API defaults to 'default'. If no 'default' template is seeded in the store, the generator falls through with nil (uses built-in title). Custom templates still fail hard if not found.

gotchas.rule: BsTool.exe is Windows-only; Linux executor returns 501
gotchas.detail: The BsTool wrapper has a platform-adaptive executor. On Windows, it runs the real BsTool.exe subprocess. On Linux, it returns HTTP 501 UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM with a remediation hint. Tests use a mock executor on both platforms.

recent_changes.summary: Comprehensive test suite refactor — 28 files, 7830 insertions. API coverage 68.2%→81.2%, server 82.3%→96.8%. Added frontend vitest suite (13 files, 146 tests). Mock external services: DNA telnet nodes (mock TCP server), BsTool.exe (mock executor), SQLite (in-memory). New files: handlers_gapfill_test.go, handlers_bstool_mock_test.go, shutdown_test.go, config_test.go, edge_cases_test.go, injection_test.go, bstool_integration_test.go, mock_e2e_test.go, web/vitest.config.ts, web/src/test/setup.ts, 13 frontend test files.
Template 'default' not found fix — non-fatal fallthrough in report generator. Found via R-LIVE phase.
BsTool wrapper (3 commits, 96.3% coverage) + R-LIVE review phase (StatusBar fix, .gitkeep sentinel, startup guard) + Creative Integration Testing doctrine
v1.0.0 release — complete Go refactor with 16 commits, embedded web UI, REST API, >80% test coverage
Repo init — Go scaffold, Makefile, CI, docs, agent briefs
